dialogue: I do not know how we survived that.
Careful wall placement and a mild disregard for panic.
The raid recovered half-burnt records from the enemy base.
My team is reconstructing the missing pieces. It is similar to path reconstruction: once the algorithm knows the route, it can trace back how it got there.
Except paper burns more easily than nodes.
And the reconstruction needs power. If the grid fails, the records are useless.
So they will hit the power supply.
*the lights flicker as if the building heard you*
Power station is the target. End distance: {endDistance}.
Keep the lights on. We are close to the name.
